metadata.notes: Phase 1 baseline — openpx pre-optimization, cargo bench --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 30

gap_vs_polyfill.orderbook_1000_ops: 6.4x SLOWER — openpx uses push+sort_unstable per op (O(n log n)); polyfill uses BTreeMap (O(log n))
gap_vs_polyfill.ws_hot_path_1lvl: 35% SLOWER — openpx uses serde_json + f64 parse
gap_vs_polyfill.json_parse_480k: already faster than polyfill's published number on this hardware — not a priority
gap_vs_polyfill.network_fetch_markets: 5.2% SLOWER on same-session comparison — mostly missing HTTP/2 stream window + TCP_NODELAY
